title: Studies on AI, Sound and Space

content.value: Practice-based research using the Dodekaotto — a 20+1 speaker dodecahedron — exploring how AI models' internal representations find correspondence in physical space.

_comment_paper: To link a research paper, replace null with: {"title": "Paper Title", "url": "papers/filename.pdf"}
_comment_links: To add external links, add objects like: {"label": "GitHub", "url": "https://..."}
